title: New York leads US in BESS moratoriums, recent data shows
summary: New York, US is leading the country in battery energy storage system (BESS) moratoriums, with 97 moratoriums in place, according to renewables service provider Carina Energy.

title: Google completes US$4.75 billion Intersect Power acquisition, initial focus on California & Texas solar-plus-storage
summary: Google has finalised its acquisition of US renewable energy developer Intersect Power, as part of its plan to power its data centre expansions in the US.

title: Flow battery startup ESS Tech Inc looks to acquisitions, big-name US partnerships for hope in future profitability
summary: Iron flow battery company ESS Tech Inc highlighted its recent partnership with Google and the acquisition of VoltStorage GmbH, as profitability remained out of reach in 2025.

title: ‘You need a clear RFQ to get clear offers’: Procuring BESS at scale with European IPP R.Power
summary: European IPP R.Power’s head of BESS and CCO sat down with Energy-Storage.news at the Energy Storage Summit 2026 last month for a video interview to discuss the firm's storage activity and approach to

title: MGA Thermal raises AU$17 million as thermal energy storage startup enters commercial scale-up phase
summary: Australia’s MGA Thermal has secured AU$17 million (US$12 million) in new investment for its long-duration thermal energy storage technology as it enters the commercial scale-up phase.

title: New Jersey state government advances 1GW of battery storage in energy affordability push
summary: New Jersey's regulator has approved the construction of battery storage facilities and a procurement for further energy storage resources in the PJM-connected US state.

title: US BESS industry is ‘primed for years of growth’: Enertis Applus+ on financing storage in the FEOC era
summary: Energy-Storage.news speaks to Willliam Lauwers, head of technology, BESS, at consulting, engineering and quality control firm Enertis Applus+, ahead of the upcoming Energy Storage Summit USA.

title: US Roundup: Over US$2 billion of financing updates from Arevon, Primergy and Gridstor
summary: In this US news roundup, we have financing updates for GridStor, Arevon, and Primergy, related to energy storage projects in Texas, California, and Nevada, respectively.

title: EU Roundup: 700MWh of BESS projects move forward in Germany, Belgium, France, Finland, Latvia and Portugal
summary: Another busy week of BESS news from across Europe, with investors and owner-operators ABO, Field, Aspiravi, Prime Capital, Latvenergo, Sonnedix and Amarenco progressing large-scale projects across Eur

title: What makes a ‘priority market’ for scaling long-duration energy storage?
summary: The LDES Council’s policy team discusses the role of policy and markets in scaling long-duration energy storage globally with ESN Premium.
